tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def done-linear (filter #(= (:state %) "done") (linear_issues)))
(def closed-by-pr (set (map :closes_linear (filter #(= (:state %) "merged") (github_pull_requests)))))
(def unclosed-done (filter #(contains? closed-by-pr (:id %)) done-linear))
(count unclosed-done)
(map :id unclosed-done)"}
